basics.name: Marcelo Santos Guimarães
basics.label: Associate Professor of Theoretical Physics
basics.summary: Associate Professor (Professor Associado) at the Departamento de Física Teórica, Instituto de Física, Universidade do Estado do Rio de Janeiro (UERJ). CNPq Level-2 Research Productivity Fellow and UERJ Prociência Fellow. Research focuses on non-perturbative aspects of quantum field theory: the Gribov-Zwanziger approach to colour confinement in QCD, and quantum information properties of quantum field theory vacua — Bell inequalities, entanglement entropy, and relative entropy in relativistic QFT. Author of 86+ peer-reviewed publications with over 1,700 citations (INSPIRE-HEP).

work.name: Universidade do Estado do Rio de Janeiro (UERJ)
work.summary: Departamento de Física Teórica, Instituto de Física. Teaching graduate and undergraduate physics courses; supervising doctoral and master's students; research in non-perturbative QFT.

work.name: Universidade do Estado do Rio de Janeiro (UERJ)
work.summary: Postdoctoral research in theoretical particle physics. Funded by CAPES.

Diploma de Dignidade Acadêmica — Magna Cum Laude (UFRJ, 2005)

publications.name: 86+ peer-reviewed publications
publications.publisher: Physical Review D, JHEP, Nuclear Physics B, European Physical Journal C, SciPost Physics, and others
publications.summary: Full list available on INSPIRE-HEP. Topics: Bell inequalities in QFT, entanglement and relative entropy, Gribov-Zwanziger confinement, non-Abelian gauge theories.

projects.name: Bell Inequalities in Quantum Field Theory
projects.summary: Theoretical and numerical study of Bell-CHSH and Mermin inequalities for free and gauge quantum fields using Weyl operators and modular theory.
highlights: Maximal Bell violations for free scalar and Proca fields
Cat states as Bell inequality probes (2026)

projects.name: Confinement and the Gribov Problem
projects.summary: Non-perturbative studies of QCD using the Gribov-Zwanziger framework — gluon and ghost propagators, refined GZ action, comparison with lattice QCD.
highlights: Consistent description of lattice gluon propagator
